member.name: M:GTA.TaskInvoker.StartVehicleMission(GTA.Vehicle,GTA.Ped,GTA.VehicleMissionType,System.Single,GTA.VehicleDrivingFlags,System.Single,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Tells the
to target another ped with a vehicle.
member.param:
The
to use to achieve the task.
The cruise speed for the task.
The driving flags for the task.
The distance at which the AI thinks the target has been reached and the car stops. To pick default value, the parameter can be passed in as -1 .
The distance at which the AI switches to heading for the target directly instead of following the nodes. To pick default value, the parameter can be passed in as -1 .

if set to
, allows the car to drive on the opposite side of the road into incoming traffic.
